title: Sprite Animation
description: Key design elements for pixel art animations, retro explainers, sprite scenes, and 8-bit motion concepts.

question_templates.question: 这个像素动画要表达什么：教程、品牌故事、产品解释、历史短片，还是趣味动效？
动画分几个阶段？每个阶段发生什么？
风格偏 8-bit、16-bit、掌机、街机、复古 RPG，还是极简像素？

defaults.output_contract: structured sprite animation storyboard or HTML animation concept
defaults.primary_user: viewer or player reading a small animated sprite sequence
defaults.business_domain: game asset design and lightweight animation
defaults.decision_goal: make the sprite subject, motion loop, and visual personality readable at small size
defaults.visual_direction: pixel-aware animation storyboard with clear silhouette, limited palette, and loop-friendly motion beats
